title: Skinwalker Ranch & the Portal Triangles
summary: The Utah ranch as one grid-point in a planetary polyhedron of portals — the Dragon, Seattle, Alberta, Antarctica, and Arctic Triangles.
markdown:
Asked about **Skinwalker Ranch** in the [John Toth session](/sessions/2023-02-09-session-with-unimetrix-1-john-toth/)
of February 9, 2023, Unimetrix 1 gives the famous Utah property a precise place in the
archive's geometry: it is *"an interdimensional portal doorway"* — a **grid point** that
*"allows the interaction of high cosmic culture in the related geographic gravitational
area… the patrol and the interaction of cosmic culture, transit and exit of their personnel
and quantum displacement devices."* Not a haunted ranch, in this telling, but a border
crossing.

And not alone. The session names the wider network in one breath: *"the Dragon Triangle,
Seattle Triangle, Alberta Triangle, Antarctica Triangle, Arctic Triangle — follow the grid
point of the **Icosidodecahedron** geometric platonic figure."* The Earth, in the record's
physics, is caged in a polyhedron of such doorways — the same ley-line geometry that runs
through its account of the [Bermuda Triangle](/lore/bermuda-triangle/) (whose entry maps the
same idea in the Atlantic), the temple-anchored [stargates](/lore/stargate/), and the
Platonic-solid architecture claimed for Unimetrix's own
[quantum computers](/lore/quantum-computer/).

One session, one answer — but it knots a modern paranormal landmark into the archive's oldest
pattern: geometry as infrastructure, and certain places on Earth as doors that were never
fully closed. Preserved as spoken.
